briefdescription.para: HCG and LCG combined in sensor.
Enumeration type of sensor native HDR mode.
Enumeration type of sensor AF mode.
Enumeration type of sensor focusing position mode.
Cam Device sensor output data type.
Enumeration type of sensor native HDR mode.
Enumeration type of sensor AF mode.

This function opens a sensor device with the specified mode.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the sensor mode to open
